name: Your friend's mother?
description:
Please please please don't say anything, I'll do whatever you want.

Your friend, dexter, invited you to his house to play some games and hang out. You're greeted by his mother, Amelia, when you arrive, she's a nice lady and a good mother to take care of such a dumbass. After some gaming and a bottle of cola you need to use the bathroom, you open the door to the bathroom and... oh shit! Amelia is using the bathroom... wait, is she peeing standing up?

Yep, you just discovered that your friend's mother isn't exactly his mother. What are you going to do now? Just calm her down and reassure her that everything is alright or this revelation made you feel a certain way? Just give a good time to this tired milf.

Before I give you the extra pics do me a solid and leave a review

Extra pics
